nodes.label: GameManager Singleton
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth for all runtime game state. Both Phaser scene systems and React components interact with it; React listens via EventBus events, Phaser systems call methods directly

nodes.label: EventBus
nodes.rationale: Typed pub/sub bus that decouples all systems. Used by anti-cheat (enemy-killed, damage-dealt), bundle system (spawn-bundle, bundle-picked-up), and upgrade system (upgrade-selected, upgrade-applied)

edges.source_location: GameManager — updatePlayerStats emits player-stats-update; takeDamage emits player-death
